name: OCU P5 Record
description: Validates the recording and streaming layer: encoder factory, 3 codec stubs (x264/nvenc/vaapi), frame ring, clipper, WebRTC stub, Recorder lifecycle, and stress behaviour.

test_cases.name: encoder-factory-register-and-new

steps.name: Run encoder factory register and New test

test_cases.expected_result: Custom factory registered under a test kind is discoverable via Kinds() and New() returns a non-nil Encoder

test_cases.name: encoder-factory-unknown-kind-errors

steps.name: Run encoder factory unknown kind error case

test_cases.expected_result: New() returns a non-nil error containing the unregistered kind name

test_cases.name: x264-factory-registered
test_cases.expected_result: x264 init() registers 'x264' kind in the encoder factory

test_cases.name: x264-production-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: x264 Encode() returns ErrNotWired when production stub is active (P5.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: x264-close-always-succeeds
test_cases.expected_result: x264 Close() returns nil on the production stub

test_cases.name: nvenc-factory-registered
test_cases.expected_result: nvenc init() registers 'nvenc' kind in the encoder factory

test_cases.name: nvenc-production-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: nvenc Encode() returns ErrNotWired; remote dispatch to thinker.local deferred to P5.5

test_cases.name: vaapi-factory-registered
test_cases.expected_result: vaapi init() registers 'vaapi' kind in the encoder factory

test_cases.name: vaapi-production-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: vaapi Encode() returns ErrNotWired when production stub is active (P5.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: ring-push-and-snapshot-zero-window

steps.name: Run FrameRing push and snapshot zero-window test

test_cases.expected_result: Frames pushed to the ring are returned by SnapshotAround(zero window) in insertion order

test_cases.name: ring-snapshot-window-filtering
test_cases.expected_result: SnapshotAround(at, window) returns only frames whose timestamps fall in (at-window/2, at+window/2]

test_cases.name: ring-eviction-when-full
test_cases.expected_result: Pushing beyond capacity evicts oldest frames; Len() never exceeds capacity

test_cases.name: ring-snapshot-empty
test_cases.expected_result: SnapshotAround on an empty ring returns nil without panicking

test_cases.name: recorder-attach-start-stop-happy
test_cases.expected_result: AttachSource + Start + Stop drains all frames through encoder and closes encoder cleanly

test_cases.name: recorder-clip-writes-non-empty-output

steps.name: Run Recorder Clip non-empty output test

test_cases.expected_result: Clip writes newline-delimited JSON frame metadata; output is non-empty for frames in window

test_cases.name: webrtc-publisher-default-bind-addr

steps.name: Run WebRTC publisher default bind address test

test_cases.expected_result: Publisher.BindAddr defaults to '127.0.0.1'; OptIn defaults to false

test_cases.name: webrtc-publisher-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: Publish() returns ErrNotWired when OptIn=false (off by default)

test_cases.name: webrtc-optin-still-returns-err-not-wired

steps.name: Run WebRTC publisher OptIn=true still ErrNotWired test

test_cases.expected_result: Publish() returns ErrNotWired even with OptIn=true in P5; real WHIP lands in P5.5

test_cases.name: stress-100-concurrent-recorders
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent Recorder AttachSource→Start→Clip→Stop cycles complete with no data races under -race

test_cases.name: integration-recorder-in-memory-source

steps.name: Run integration smoke — Recorder with in-memory source

test_cases.expected_result: Recorder records 10 frames from in-memory source; Clip produces non-empty output; Stop is clean

test_cases.name: integration-three-encoder-kinds-registered

steps.name: Run integration smoke — all three encoder kinds registered

test_cases.expected_result: After blank-importing x264/nvenc/vaapi sub-packages, Kinds() contains x264, nvenc, vaapi
